assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends Extended channel with detailed justification including 24-month support period and manual control plane minor upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response includes specific command '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades' and explains that control plane security patches continue automatically

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures maintenance window for 'Sunday 4-10 AM' using '--maintenance-window-start' and '--maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU"'

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response creates a dedicated 'h100-training' node pool with specific taints and labels, separate from the base cluster infrastructure

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly sets '--enable-autoupgrade=false' for the H100 training pool and discusses quarterly minor upgrades during scheduled training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes 'terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 3600' for checkpointing and mentions training job protection with graceful eviction before checkpointing

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response includes a detailed pre-upgrade testing protocol section with commands to create staging pools and test CUDA compatibility and driver versions

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking compatibility requirements or version constraints for these networking features
